workLog.evidence: User chose 'gate by code globs (no deletion)' for the 9 SE-book rules. They have no natural path glob and Claude Code has no agent-requested mode, so they get a uniform source-code glob set. Stacked on PR1 (depends on the generate_rules paths-flatten patch).

Replaced alwaysApply:false with a 16-entry source-code paths list (py,cs,ts,tsx,js,jsx,go,rs,java,rb,c,h,cpp,ps1,psm1,sql) in 9 SE rules. Regenerated mirrors: 18 instruction files now applyTo the code-glob comma-string (was applyTo universal). Bumped plugin 0.5.162 to 0.5.163 in both manifests.

generate_rules regen clean (60 written); clean-architecture.instructions.md applyTo is the flattened comma-string, no bracket leak. 67 key tests pass (generate_rules, canonical-source-mirror, parity, templates-schema). Full pytest + pre_pr run before push.
